read_me_first.purpose: ChatGPT-optimized Sleeper fantasy football league export.
how_to_read: Start with sleeper_chatgpt_manifest.json to choose the right file.
Use sleeper_chatgpt_team_roster_and_picks_summary.json for roster and pick inventory questions.
Use sleeper_chatgpt_draft_board_summary.json for live draft questions.
Use sleeper_chatgpt_matchups_standings_summary.json for standings and matchup questions.
Use sleeper_chatgpt.json only as the full source-of-truth archive.
